name: okf-bundle-smith
description: Create, enrich, validate, repair, consume, visualize, and package Open Knowledge Format bundles from web, repository, GitHub, and enterprise sources.

interface.shortDescription: Build, validate, consume, and package OKF bundles.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for producing and consuming Open Knowledge Format bundles with disciplined source research, concept design, frontmatter hygiene, citations, indexes, update logs, validation, graph export, GitHub attachment, retrieval, context packing, and packaging.
defaultPrompt: Create an OKF bundle from authoritative sources.
Review and repair this OKF bundle.
Attach this GitHub-hosted OKF bundle and answer from it with citations.
